summary: Matched four functions/items in Kirby's ftKb_SpecialNYs source by replacing three stub markers with C implementations and adjusting one near-matched animation function. The bot report attributes +460 matched bytes and four 100% items in main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNYs.

key_files.role: Only changed file; added implementations for ftKb_SpecialNYs_8010A8BC, ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B868, ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B8E0, helper inline motion-id selectors, and adjusted ftKb_MsSpecialNLoop_Anim.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report, 4 new matches

what_changed.text: Replaced the stub marker for ftKb_SpecialNYs_8010A8BC with logic that checks fp->target_item_gobj, derives a bool from four Yoshi-copy capture motion IDs, calls it_802F2E7C, then clears fp->x1A64 and fp->target_item_gobj.
Added inline getAirSpecialMotionId and getGroundSpecialMotionId helpers that choose Marth-copy motion IDs when fp->fv.kb.hat.kind == FTKIND_MARS and Fire Emblem-copy motion IDs otherwise.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hunk adding getAirSpecialMotionId and getGroundSpecialMotionId

what_changed.text: Implemented ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B868 and ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B8E0 using ftCommon_8007D5D4 or ftCommon_8007D7FC followed by Fighter_ChangeMotionState with the helper-selected motion ID, flag 0x0C4C7084, current animation frame, rate 1.0f, blend 0.0f, and NULL.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hunk around ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B868 and ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B8E0

what_changed.text: Adjusted ftKb_MsSpecialNLoop_Anim by changing charge from u32* to s32*, casting dat_attrs charge_iterations addresses to s32*, and calling ftKb_SpecialNPe_8010C148 when the charge frame threshold is exceeded instead of ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining.

Bot report records four new 100% matches: ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B868 (+120 bytes), ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B8E0 (+120 bytes), ftKb_SpecialNYs_8010A8BC (+116 bytes), and ftKb_MsSpecialNLoop_Anim from 97.69% to 100% (+3 bytes).

smart_moves.text: Factored the air and ground Marth-vs-Fire Emblem motion ID choice into small inline helpers, reducing repeated conditional logic inside the two transition functions.

Used established Fighter and Kirby fields directly, including GET_FIGHTER, fp->fv.kb.hat.kind, fp->dat_attrs, fp->mv.kb.specialn_ms.cur_frame, fp->cmd_vars[0], fp->target_item_gobj, and fp->x1A64, rather than raw pointer arithmetic in the changed code.
For the near-matched loop animation function, the small semantic call-site correction to ftKb_SpecialNPe_8010C148 is supported by the bot report moving ftKb_MsSpecialNLoop_Anim from 97.69% to 100%.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For Kirby copy-special transitions, check whether closely related air and ground functions differ only by the common ground/air setup helper and a selected motion ID; small inline selectors can express the shared Marth-vs-Fire Emblem motion choice while preserving matchability.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B868 and ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B8E0 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a nearly matched animation-loop function gates on a dat_attrs charge counter, signedness and the exact follow-up helper call can be enough to close the match; here s32 charge pointer casts and ftKb_SpecialNPe_8010C148 produced the recorded 100% result.
scope: Kirby Marth/Fire Emblem copied special-N charge loop

naming_conventions.name: fp
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added functions use Fighter* fp = GET_FIGHTER(gobj)

naming_conventions.name: gobj
naming_conventions.convention: Fighter_GObj* or HSD_GObj* object argument passed through to GET_FIGHTER and transition/item helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function signatures and helper calls

naming_conventions.name: has_destroy_type
naming_conventions.convention: Boolean local used for the item-destroy-type argument derived from capture motion ID membership.

naming_conventions.name: getAirSpecialMotionId/getGroundSpecialMotionId
naming_conventions.convention: Helper names describe air vs ground special motion ID selection, but PR evidence only shows these local inline names in this file and does not prove a global naming standard.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use direct typed Fighter/Kirby field access for hat kind, target item, dat_attrs, movement vars, and command vars.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.result: Supported by bot-reported 100% matches for changed items.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce small inline helper functions for shared motion ID selection rather than duplicating the conditional at each Fighter_ChangeMotionState call.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B868 and ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B8E0 100%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.result: Both transition functions were reported as new 100% matches.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use signed s32* charge pointer casts when selecting between ms and fe charge_iterations in ftKb_MsSpecialNLoop_Anim.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.result: The function moved from 97.69% to 100% in the bot report.

evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: single changed file and line counts
raw_diff: complete diff excerpt for changed file
notes: PR body is empty and there are no review comments, so reviewer rationale and author explanation are unavailable.
The bot report provides match outcomes, but the slice does not include compiler command output, objdiff details, or adjacent regression inspection.
Inline helpers and local naming are evidenced only in this file; do not generalize them into a project-wide convention without additional corroboration.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Kirby copy-special motion selection can match as small inline Marth-vs-FE helpers
accepted_candidate_records.text: In ftKb_SpecialNYs.c, PR #2226 matched ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B868 and ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B8E0 by adding getAirSpecialMotionId/getGroundSpecialMotionId inline helpers that select Marth-copy or Fire Emblem-copy motion IDs based on fp->fv.kb.hat.kind == FTKIND_MARS, then using those helpers in Fighter_ChangeMotionState.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: helper and transition function additions
text_corpus: bot report, two new 100% transition matches

accepted_candidate_records.title: ftKb_MsSpecialNLoop_Anim closed with signed charge pointer and exact callback
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2226 changed ftKb_MsSpecialNLoop_Anim from u32* charge to s32* charge with casts from ms/fe charge_iterations, and replaced ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining with ftKb_SpecialNPe_8010C148 when the charge threshold is exceeded; the bot report records the item improving from 97.69% to 100%.

rejection_notes: No review comments were present, so no reviewer preference or requested cleanup should be inferred.
Do not promote getAirSpecialMotionId/getGroundSpecialMotionId naming as a global helper naming convention from this single-file PR alone.
Do not claim broader Kirby or fighter data-attribute signedness rules beyond the specific charge_iterations use shown here.
